name: ASRock A520M PHANTOM GAMING 4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD A520 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4733+(OC) - 2x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-A - Gigabit LAN
shortName: ASRock A520M PHANTOM GAMING 4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4
description: Budget-friendly Micro-ATX motherboard for AM4 socket with A520 chipset, DDR4 support, and basic features.
